description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular wooden structure with a dark brown finish and a slightly angled front panel for user interaction. The upper section houses a colorful marquee with the text 'Nudge Shuffle' surrounded by vibrant graphics and illuminated elements. The control panel below the marquee is equipped with multiple buttons and a display area, likely for game instructions and score readouts, with a metallic trim and a set of coin slots. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, showcasing the wood grain texture without any additional graphics or decals. The cabinet stands on a flat base, providing stability, and the front-facing area is designed for easy access to the controls and screen. The overall design is typical of classic arcade machines found in public entertainment spaces.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden arcade game cabinet with a colorful marquee, control panel with buttons, and a plain wood grain finish on the sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee artwork, control panel with buttons, display area, and coin slots.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wooden panel and the angled profile of the control area.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a completely plain, flat wooden surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain wooden panel and the angled control section.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with multiple colored buttons arranged in rows, a central display area, and coin slots below
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features vibrant, colorful graphics with the text 'Nudge Shuffle' and various themed imagery, illuminated for visibility
